title: cyathea australis
intro: Cyathea australis, also known as the Rough Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia and New Zealand. Its medicinal properties include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Cyathea australis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
